records.question: Which cities are exactly named Taizhou ( Zhejiang )?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT city.city_id FROM city
WHERE city.city = 'Taizhou ( Zhejiang )'
records.pred_sql: SELECT City_ID FROM city WHERE City = 'Taizhou (Zhejiang)'

records.question: Which cities where city is Shanghai have temperatures exactly 18.3 in March, exactly 19.4 in November, at least 20.6 in July and September, and at most 20.6 in August and at most 18.3 in December?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT city.city_id FROM city
JOIN temperature ON city.city_id = temperature.city_id
WHERE temperature.sep >= 20.6 AND temperature.jul >= 20.6 AND temperature.mar = 18.3 AND temperature.nov = 19.4 AND city.city = 'Shanghai' AND temperature.dec <= 18.3 AND temperature.aug <= 20.6
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.City_ID FROM city AS T1 INNER JOIN temperature AS T2 ON T1.City_ID = T2.City_ID WHERE T1.City = 'Shanghai' AND T2.Mar = 18.3 AND T2.Nov = 19.4 AND T2.Jul >= 20.6 AND T2.Sep >= 20.6 AND T2.Aug <= 20.6 AND T2.Dec <= 18.3

records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.City_ID FROM city AS T1 INNER JOIN temperature AS T2 ON T1.City_ID = T2.City_ID WHERE T1.City = 'Wuxi ( Jiangsu )' AND T1.GDP <= 688.02 AND T2.Sep = 21.1 AND T2.Jun >= 20.6

records.question: Which cities named 常州 with the hanyu pinyin Chángzhōu and city name Changzhou ( Jiangsu ) have a regional population of at most 4591972 and a GDP of no more than 358.04?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT city.city_id FROM city
WHERE city.hanyu_pinyin = 'Chángzhōu' AND city.city = 'Changzhou ( Jiangsu )' AND city.hanzi = '常州' AND city.regional_population <= 4591972 AND city.gdp <= 358.04
records.pred_sql: SELECT City_ID FROM city WHERE Hanzi = '常州' AND Hanyu_Pinyin = 'Chángzhōu' AND City = 'Changzhou ( Jiangsu )' AND Regional_Population <= 4591972 AND GDP <= 358.04

records.question: What cities where hanyu_pinyin is Jiāxīng and hanzi is 嘉兴/ 嘉興 have a regional population of 4501700, a GDP exactly 266.81, January temperature at least 25.6, and March, June, and November temperatures exactly 26.6, 28.3, and 27.2?

SELECT city.city_id FROM city
